sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tho un, no hotkhiatsa tate, lutang Khazih beel khempeuh;
Tho un, no minam vangliante, Zion ah
gal hong paima’n.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A vanglian la gingsak ta un,
Tuipi nakpi ging
bangin;
Ei hong tatna Khazih si hang,
Gualzo pente i hi hi, Gualzo pente i hi hi,
Gualzo
pente i hi hi,
Ei hong tatna Jesuh si hang, gualzo pente i hi hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Eima a misiang
galhangte, hih thu bekah kip uh hi;
I tunga dial kipei mu un, Jesuh hang gualzote
hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Si lo-in i lau kei ciat hi, nuntakna Pasian sung om;
Ama hong kilat zingsang
ciang,
Minthanna tui hong luang khia.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: I vekpi’n Amai i ding ding, minthang i
Topa mu ding;
Lungdamin Amah phat baih ding, Thaman ciat ding sang ciat ding.
